div.p: O URL oficial para este guia de implementação é:
Example IG exercises many of the fields in a SUSHI configuration.

title.value: HL7 PT FHIR Implementation Guide: Terminologias

description.value: Example IG exercises many of the fields in a SUSHI configuration.

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: Sistema de codificação local CEFRLevels (CPARADM v3.0.0).

name.value: Mapeamento de códigos CTC para unidades de apresentação para EDQM

description.value: Tabela Da Área M - Tabela De Radiologia

Orphanet classification of rare diseases. Contains all entities from the 34 Orphanet classification trees, with hierarchical parent-child relationships. Source: Orphadata CC BY 4.0 (https://www.orphadata.com) Codes are Orphanet ORPHA numbers (e.g., ORPHA:98050).
Subsistemas de saúde existentes em Portugal
